SRX.Chargen.title: Character Creation
SRX.Chargen.illegalBuild: This build isn't legal yet — resolve the issues on the Review step.
SRX.Chargen.chooserHint: Build a new character with the priority system, or spend Karma to advance an existing one.
SRX.Chargen.prioritiesHint: Assign priorities A–E: one per category, one per row.
SRX.Chargen.assignAll: Assign a distinct priority (A–E) to every category.
SRX.Chargen.metatypeHint: Choose a metatype available at your Metatype priority.
SRX.Chargen.attributeCostHint: Ratings 2–4 cost 1 point each; 5–6 cost 2 each. Cap 6 before metatype modifiers.
SRX.Chargen.mundane: Priority E — this character is mundane (no Magic or Resonance).
SRX.Chargen.magicHint: Pick Magic or Resonance (never both). The rating equals your unaugmented Willpower, capped by the priority and by ⌊Essence⌋.
SRX.Chargen.skillCostHint: Ratings 1–4 cost 1 point each; 5–6 cost 2 each. Specializations cost 1 point and need rating 4+.
SRX.Chargen.specNeedsRating4: Specializations require a skill rating of 4 or higher.
SRX.Chargen.resourcesHint: Nuyen buys gear, weapons, and augmentations (tracked on the sheet). Enter total spent; up to 25,000¥ carries over.
SRX.Chargen.noTalentCatalog: No talents found. Import the catalog first (GM · Settings · SRX Catalog Import) to buy talents here; you can always add them to the sheet later.
SRX.Chargen.talentsHint: Metatype-priority Karma is unrestricted; Magic/Resonance-priority Karma may only fund magical or threading talents.
SRX.Chargen.problem.rowReused: Priority {row} is used more than once.
SRX.Chargen.problem.attributeOutOfRange: {attr}: base {value} is out of range (1–6 before metatype).
SRX.Chargen.problem.awakenedNeedsPriorit: Awakened/Emergent characters need a Magic or Resonance priority above E.
SRX.Chargen.problem.magicPriorityUnused: A Magic/Resonance priority is assigned but no awakened type is chosen.
SRX.Chargen.problem.nuyenForfeited: {lost}¥ over the 25,000¥ carryover cap will be lost.
SRX.Chargen.problem.tooManyOnes: More than two attributes are at rating 1 ({count}).
SRX.Chargen.problem.needsTwoGeneralSkill: Fewer than two non-combat/hacking/magic/vehicle skills at rating 2+ ({count}).
SRX.Advance.title: Karma Advancement
SRX.Advance.notOwner: You don't own this character — you can't spend its Karma.
SRX.Advance.knowledgeNeedsName: Enter a knowledge domain or language name first.
SRX.Advance.noTalentCatalog: No talents found. Import the catalog to buy talents here.
SRX.Advance.reason.overMax: That would exceed the maximum rating.
SRX.Advance.reason.specNeedsRating4: Specializations require a skill rating of 4 or higher.
